name: ltm-wiki
description: AI-agent long-term memory wiki with portable markdown stores and an Obsidian backend.

interface.shortDescription: Long-term memory wiki for AI agents
interface.longDescription: Use LTM Wiki to let AI agents remember, recall, consolidate, and maintain durable knowledge in user-owned memory stores. It ships with markdown-files and Obsidian storage backends plus Codex, Claude, and generic agent instructions.
defaultPrompt: Recall relevant long-term memory for this task.
Check this memory store for stale or broken entries.
